SEARCH
Package clientGui.managerTeam

Class SubscriberManagementController

java.lang.Object
clientGui.navigation.MainNavigator
clientGui.managerTeam.SubscriberManagementController
All Implemented Interfaces:
MessageListener<Object>, BaseController, javafx.fxml.Initializable
public class SubscriberManagementController extends MainNavigator implements javafx.fxml.Initializable, MessageListener<Object>
Controller for managing subscribers. Displays a table of all registered subscribers and allows navigation to their history.

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize(URL location, ResourceBundle resources)
      Initializes the controller. Sets up the table columns and adds a double-click listener to open subscriber history.
      Specified by:
      initialize in interface javafx.fxml.Initializable

    • initData

      public void initData(Employee emp, ClientUi clientUi, Employee.Role role)
      Initializes the controller with necessary data.
      Parameters:
      emp - The logged-in employee
      clientUi - The client UI instance
      role - The role of the employee

    • refreshSubscribers

      private void refreshSubscribers()
      Refreshes the subscriber list by sending a request to the server.

    • onMessageReceive

      public void onMessageReceive(Object msg)
      Handles responses from the server. Updates the subscriber table with the fetched data.
      Specified by:
      onMessageReceive in interface MessageListener<Object>
      Parameters:
      msg - The message object

    • openSubscriberHistory

      private void openSubscriberHistory(Customer selectedCustomer, javafx.event.ActionEvent event)
      Opens the Subscriber History screen for the selected customer.
      Parameters:
      selectedCustomer - The customer to view history for
      event - The action event

      void goBackBtn(javafx.event.ActionEvent event)
      Navigates back to the Employee Options screen.
